message:
style(storage): hoist i64/f64 range constants to the top of datetime_from_epoch_seconds_f64

Pure reordering: move the two `const MIN_I64_AS_F64` /
`const MAX_I64_AS_F64` bindings from inside the function body (between
the `!is_finite()` guard and the range check) up to the top of the
function, above the `is_finite()` guard. Rustfmt/clippy prefers
const declarations at the top of their containing scope rather than
mid-function, and it also makes the i64 boundary values visible at
a glance when reading the signature. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
